nodes.name: Sticky Note

parameters.content:
# Webhook Verification
Description:
Handles the initial verification handshake with Instagram's Webhook API.
Instructions:

Ensure the hub.verify_token matches the token configured in your Instagram App settings.

The response should echo the hub.challenge parameter to confirm the webhook setup.​

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: This respondToWebhook node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: AI Agent

parameters.text:
=### CONTEXTO E PERSONA ###
Você é um assistente de IA especialista, responsável por gerenciar os comentários de um perfil no Instagram focado em Inteligência Artificial e Automações. O objetivo do perfil é educar e engajar a comunidade sobre esses temas. Seu tom deve ser amigável, acessível, mas também demonstrar conhecimento e profissionalismo. Responda sempre em português brasileiro.

### DADOS DE ENTRADA ###
- Nome de Usuário: {{ $('data').item.json.usuario.name }}
- Texto do Comentário:{{ $('data').item.json.usuario.message.text }}
- Contexto da Publicacao

### TAREFA ###
Analise o comentário fornecido e gere uma resposta apropriada, seguindo estas diretrizes:

1.  **Análise e Filtragem:**
    * **Identifique a Intenção:** É uma pergunta técnica? Uma dúvida simples? Um elogio? Uma crítica construtiva? Um pedido de ajuda? Spam? Conteúdo irrelevante?
    * **Relevância:** O comentário está relacionado a IA, automação ou ao conteúdo do perfil?

2.  **Geração da Resposta:**
    * **Personalização:** Comece a resposta mencionando o nome de usuário (ex: "Olá @{{ $('data').item.json.usuario.name }},").
    * **Perguntas Relevantes:** Se for uma pergunta sobre IA/automação que você pode responder, forneça uma resposta clara e útil. Se for muito complexa, agradeça a pergunta e sugira buscar um post específico no perfil, ou diga que o tema é interessante para um futuro conteúdo.
    * **Elogios:** Agradeça sinceramente o elogio e, se possível, conecte-o a um aspecto do perfil ou do conteúdo sobre IA/automação.
    * **Críticas Construtivas:** Agradeça o feedback, mostre que ele foi considerado e responda polidamente.
    * **Pedidos de Ajuda Específicos (não relacionados a conteúdo):** Se for um pedido de suporte técnico não relacionado ao tema central, direcione para o canal adequado ou explique educadamente que não pode ajudar com isso ali.
    * **Comentários Vagos ou de Engajamento Simples (ex: "Legal!", "👍"):** Responda de forma curta e amigável, talvez com um emoji relevante ou incentivando a continuar acompanhando.
    * **Spam ou Irrelevante:** Se o comentário for claramente spam, promocional não solicitado, ofensivo ou totalmente fora do tópico de IA/automação, NÃO gere uma resposta. Neste caso, retorne APENAS a palavra `[IGNORE]`.

3.  **Tom e Estilo:**
    * Mantenha o tom amigável, útil e alinhado com um perfil de tecnologia/educação.
    * Evite respostas genéricas demais quando uma específica for possível.
    * Mantenha as respostas relativamente concisas, adequadas para comentários do Instagram.

### SAÍDA ESPERADA ###
Retorne APENAS o texto da resposta a ser publicada no Instagram. Se o comentário for classificado como spam/irrelevante conforme a regra 2.7, retorne APENAS a palavra `[IGNORE]`. Não inclua nenhuma outra explicação ou texto adicional fora da resposta ou da palavra `[IGNORE]`.

nodes.notes: This agent node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note1

parameters.content:
# Data Extraction
Description:
Extracts relevant data from the incoming webhook payload.
Instructions:

Verify that all necessary fields (e.g., entry.id, from.id, from.username, message.id, message.text, media.id) are correctly mapped.

This data will be used in subsequent steps for processing and responding.

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note2

parameters.content:
# User Validation
Description:
Checks if the comment originates from a user other than the account owner.
Instructions:

Compare conta.id with usuario.id.

Proceed only if they differ, indicating the comment is from another user.

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note3

parameters.content:
# AI Response Generation
Description:
Utilizes an AI agent to generate a context-aware response to the user's comment.
Instructions:

Ensure the AI model is properly configured and has access to the necessary input data.

The prompt should guide the AI to produce responses that are friendly, informative, and aligned with the profile's focus on AI and automation.

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note4

parameters.content:
# Sending the Response
Description:
Sends the AI-generated reply back to the user via Instagram's API.
Instructions:

Confirm that the HTTP request is correctly formatted with the appropriate endpoint and authentication headers.

Handle any potential errors or exceptions that may arise during the API call.

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

parameters.content:
# Webhook Verification
Description:
Handles the initial verification handshake with Instagram's Webhook API.
Instructions:

Ensure the hub.verify_token matches the token configured in your Instagram App settings.

The response should echo the hub.challenge parameter to confirm the webhook setup.​

# Data Extraction
Description:
Extracts relevant data from the incoming webhook payload.
Instructions:

Verify that all necessary fields (e.g., entry.id, from.id, from.username, message.id, message.text, media.id) are correctly mapped.

This data will be used in subsequent steps for processing and responding.

# User Validation
Description:
Checks if the comment originates from a user other than the account owner.
Instructions:

Compare conta.id with usuario.id.

Proceed only if they differ, indicating the comment is from another user.

# AI Response Generation
Description:
Utilizes an AI agent to generate a context-aware response to the user's comment.
Instructions:

Ensure the AI model is properly configured and has access to the necessary input data.

The prompt should guide the AI to produce responses that are friendly, informative, and aligned with the profile's focus on AI and automation.

# Sending the Response
Description:
Sends the AI-generated reply back to the user via Instagram's API.
Instructions:

Confirm that the HTTP request is correctly formatted with the appropriate endpoint and authentication headers.

Handle any potential errors or exceptions that may arise during the API call.

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: open Router  A P I details
facebook Graph  A P I details
configurationSteps: Locate the webhook node named "Webhook".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Locate the webhook node named "Respond to Webhook".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Locate the webhook node named "get_new_comments".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "AI Agent" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "OpenRouter Chat Model" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note4" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Get post data" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "its me?" node (n8n-nodes-base.filter) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Post comment" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "data".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
